mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD
AND ls.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND w.WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd} AND z.ZONE_ID = #{zoneId} AND l.LOCATION_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationCd}, '%') AND (ls.ITEM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%') OR i.ITEM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%')) AND ls.LOT_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lotNo}, '%') AND ls.STOCK_QTY > 0

SELECT ls.LOC_STOCK_ID, ls.PLANT_CD, ls.LOCATION_ID, ls.ITEM_CD, ls.LOT_NO, ls.STOCK_QTY, ls.RESERVED_QTY, ls.AVAILABLE_QTY, ls.REG_USER_ID, ls.REG_DTM, ls.UPD_USER_ID, ls.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.ITEM_SPEC, i.UNIT FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON ls.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD WHERE ls.LOC_STOCK_ID = #{locStockId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_LOCATION_STOCK SET STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{adjustQty}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE LOC_STOCK_ID = #{locStockId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCS_LOC_TRANS_HIS h INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls ON h.LOC_STOCK_ID = ls.LOC_STOCK_ID INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD
AND h.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND h.REG_DTM >= CONCAT(#{fromDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND h.REG_DTM <= CONCAT(#{toDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND h.TRANS_TYPE = #{transType} AND (ls.ITEM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%') OR i.ITEM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%')) AND l.LOCATION_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationCd}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_LOC_TRANS_HIS ( PLANT_CD, LOC_STOCK_ID, TRANS_TYPE, TRANS_QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_TYPE, REF_NO, REF_ID, TRANS_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{locStockId}, #{transType}, #{transQty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{refType}, #{refNo}, #{refId}, #{transRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
